name: Inclusive Language
description: Using language that is respectful and inclusive of all individuals, regardless of age, gender, or other characteristics.
when_to_apply: In all communications, including media reports and workplace interactions.
example: Using terms such as 'older adults' or 'seniors' instead of 'elderly' or 'old people'.
anti_pattern: Using language that is derogatory or perpetuates negative stereotypes.

name: Diversity Training
description: Providing training and education on diversity and inclusion to employees and media professionals.
when_to_apply: Regularly, to ensure that employees and media professionals are aware of and sensitive to the needs of diverse groups.
example: Providing training on ageism and how to create an inclusive workplace culture.
anti_pattern: Failing to provide diversity training or ignoring the needs of diverse groups.
